contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 5
- Description: Fix Google OAuth redirect_uri mismatch on perch.truesight.me.
  
  Google sign-in was failing with redirect_uri_mismatch because OmniAuth.config.full_host was hardcoded to https://edgar.truesight.me. After the canonical domain migration, the callback was landing on edgar.truesight.me instead of perch.truesight.me, breaking sessions.
  
  Changes made:
  - config/initializers/omniauth.rb: changed fallback to https://perch.truesight.me
  - config/environments/production.rb: updated action_mailer host/domain to perch.truesight.me
  - config/nginx.conf: aligned with live reality (edgar → dao_protocol, perch → Rails)
  
  Commits:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/commit/d286472b
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/commit/fe077fce
  
  Action required by user: added https://perch.truesight.me/users/auth/google_oauth2/callback to Google Cloud Console Authorized redirect URIs.
- Contributor(s): Kimi Moon <admin+kimi@truesight.me>, Gary Teh <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 8.33
--------

My Digital Signature:
